text: Hello and welcome to Real Easy English.
zh: 大家好,欢迎收听《Real Easy English》。

text: In this podcast we have real conversations in easy English to help you learn.
zh: 在这个播客节目中,我们用简单的英语进行真实对话,帮助大家学习。

text: I'm Beth. And I'm Georgie. You can find a video version of this podcast and
zh: 我是Beth。我是Georgie。你可以在我们的网站上找到这期播客的视频版本,

text: a worksheet to help you learn all on our website bbclearningenglish .com.
zh: 还有帮助你学习的练习表,网址是bbclearningenglish.com。

text: Hi Georgie. Hello Beth. How is your week going? It's going well. It's quite a busy one, isn't it?
zh: 嗨,Georgie。你好,Beth。你这周过得怎么样?挺好的。挺忙的一周,对吧?

text: is. It's only Wednesday. Yeah. It feels like Friday.
zh: 是啊。今天才周三。是啊,感觉像周五了。

text: But today we're talking about secrets.
zh: 不过今天我们要聊的是秘密。

text: A secret is a piece of information that you don't tell other people.
zh: 秘密就是你不告诉别人的信息。

text: Beth, does Does that mean you're going to tell me all of your secrets?
zh: Beth,这是不是意味着你要把你所有的秘密都告诉我?

text: No. Not now. Maybe later. Ooh, okay.
zh: 不。现在不行。也许以后吧。哦,好吧。

text: So, Georgie, are you good at keeping secrets?
zh: 那么,Georgie,你擅长保守秘密吗?

text: No, I'm definitely not good at keeping secrets.
zh: 不,我绝对不擅长保守秘密。

text: I'm a bit of an open book, which means the opposite of someone who is good at keeping secrets.
zh: 我算是个'开卷书',意思是和擅长保守秘密的人正好相反。

text: You're very honest and share things maybe too much. What about you?
zh: 你很诚实,可能会说得太多。你呢?

text: Okay. I am probably the same as you. I think I'm
zh: 嗯。我大概和你差不多。我觉得我

text: not good at keeping secrets, but if it's a really important secret and I've been told, please don't tell anyone, then I won't tell anyone.
zh: 不太擅长保守秘密,但如果是个很重要的秘密,别人叮嘱我别告诉任何人,那我就不会说出去。

text: Yes. So, Beth, what is the biggest secret you've had to keep?
zh: 是的。那Beth,你保守过的最大的秘密是什么?

text: Oh, I flew abroad to surprise my boyfriend
zh: 哦,我曾经飞到国外去给我男朋友一个惊喜,

text: at the time, his dad, and we had to keep it a secret.
zh: 当时是他爸爸,我们必须保密。

text: And we even called him in the morning on a video call and
zh: 我们甚至在早上给他打了视频电话,

text: pretended we were at home and we were actually in a different country.
zh: 假装我们在家,其实我们在另一个国家。

text: Oh my gosh. So that was a big secret. So it went well?
zh: 天哪。那可是个大秘密。结果顺利吗?

text: Was he surprised he was very surprised we were very pleased that we kept it a secret
zh: 他很惊讶,我们也很高兴成功保密了。

text: we did well well done well done um i've had to keep a big secret
zh: 我们做得不错。做得好,做得好。呃,我也保守过一个大秘密。

text: um last year my friend told me
zh: 呃,去年我朋友告诉我,

text: that she was going to propose to her girlfriend but she told me i had to keep it a secret
zh: 她打算向她女朋友求婚,但她让我保密。

text: and it's really it was really difficult because we have a group of friends
zh: 这真的很难,因为我们有一群共同的朋友,

text: and i really wanted to tell them but but I couldn't and I managed to keep it a secret.
zh: 我特别想告诉他们,但我不能说,最后我成功保密了。

text: So I was very proud of myself. That's good, well done.
zh: 所以我为自己感到骄傲。真棒,做得好。

text: That reminds me, I had a big secret too.
zh: 这让我想起来,我也有过一个大秘密。

text: My friend told me, don't tell anyone and don't tell your mum. And I told my mum by accident.
zh: 我朋友告诉我,别告诉任何人,也别告诉你妈妈。结果我不小心告诉了我妈妈。

text: Oh no, can you reveal the secret to us? Oh yeah, she was pregnant, but she's now had the baby.
zh: 哦不,你能跟我们透露这个秘密吗?哦好吧,她当时怀孕了,不过现在已经生了。

text: Okay. But she said, yeah, I'm pregnant, but it's really early. So please don't tell anyone.
zh: 好吧。但她说,是的,我怀孕了,但还很早,所以请别告诉任何人。

text: don't even tell your mum and then I spoke to my mum a few weeks later and said you don't know she's pregnant
zh: 甚至别告诉你妈妈。结果几周后我跟我妈聊天时说,你还不知道她怀孕了吧,

text: and then I realized I wasn't supposed to tell you but that was kind of an accident oh it was definitely an accident
zh: 然后我才意识到我不该说的,不过那算是个意外。哦,那绝对是个意外。

text: yeah I felt really bad oh well now she's had the baby it's all good it's not a surprise anymore
zh: 是啊,我当时感觉很愧疚。哦,不过现在她已经生了孩子,一切都好,也不再是秘密了。

text: Beth do you think secrets are a good or a bad bad
zh: Beth,你觉得秘密是好事还是坏事?

text: thing? I think it really depends
zh: 我觉得这真的要看情况,

text: on the secret. There are good secrets, like proposing or having a baby,
zh: 要看是什么秘密。有些秘密是好的,比如求婚或怀孕,

text: and then I guess a bad secret really is a lie. If you have to lie, then that's not good.
zh: 但我猜坏的秘密其实就是谎言。如果你不得不撒谎,那就不好了。

text: Yeah, I agree. It's not good to
zh: 是的,我同意。撒谎不好。

text: lie. And I think that's a reason why I'm I'm not very good at keeping secrets because I'm a really bad liar.
zh: 我想这也是为什么我不太擅长保守秘密,因为我特别不会撒谎。

text: You can see it in my face if I'm holding in a secret.
zh: 如果我藏着秘密,从我脸上就能看出来。

text: Yeah, I think sometimes you can look at someone's face and know what
zh: 是啊,我觉得有时候你能从一个人的脸上看出他们在想什么。

text: they're thinking. I'm definitely like that if I'm annoyed or angry or something you can tell from my face.
zh: 如果我生气或者不高兴什么的,肯定能从我脸上看出来。

text: Well, that's good because I'll always know that you're being honest and not keeping any secrets from me.
zh: 嗯,那挺好的,因为这样我就知道你一直很诚实,没有对我隐瞒任何秘密。

text: Let's recap the vocabulary we heard during the conversation.
zh: 让我们来回顾一下对话中出现的词汇。

text: We had a secret, which is a piece of information that you can't tell
zh: 我们提到了'secret'(秘密),指的是不能告诉别人的信息。

text: other people. And we also have the phrase keep a secret, which means to not share that piece of information.
zh: 我们还学到了短语'keep a secret'(保守秘密),意思是不把那条信息说出去。

text: If someone is an open book, they don't have secrets and they're honest about their life.
zh: 如果一个人是'open book'(开卷书),意味着他们没有秘密,对自己的生活很坦诚。

text: And if you lie, you say something that's not true.
zh: 如果你'lie'(撒谎),就是说了不真实的话。

text: It's usually seen as negative, but sometimes you have to lie if you want to keep a secret.
zh: 这通常被视为负面行为,但有时候为了保守秘密,你不得不撒谎。

text: And we call someone who lies a lot a liar. And that's it for this episode of Real Easy English.
zh: 我们把经常撒谎的人叫做'liar'(骗子)。这就是本期《Real Easy English》的全部内容。

text: Test what you've learnt with the free worksheets on our website, bbclearningenglish .com.
zh: 去我们网站bbclearningenglish.com上,用免费的练习表测试一下你学到的内容吧。

text: We'll be back next week with another conversation in Easy English. Goodbye. Bye.
zh: 我们下周将带来另一场简单英语对话,再见。拜拜。
